_comment: Pollster ratings database. See core/pollster_ratings.py for format documentation.
_comment2: votehub_pct_within_moe: decimal 0.0-1.0 (e.g. 0.78 = within MOE 78% of the time)
_comment3: silver_grade: letter grade with +/- (e.g. 'A-', 'B+', 'A/B' for sparse data)
_comment4: silver_house_effect_lean / votehub_house_effect_lean: negative = R/conservative lean, positive = D/progressive lean (pp); weighted 2/3 Silver + 1/3 VoteHub when both present
_comment5: house_effect: {candidate: pp} per-candidate override, positive = pollster over-estimates
